results.title: PM Narendra Modi pays tribute to NTR on 103rd birth anniversary: 'His contributions to cinema continue to captivate'
results.description: NTR 103 birth anniversary: NTR received three National Film Awards for co-producing Thodu Dongalu (1954) and Seetharama Kalyanam (1960), and for directing Varakatnam (1970).

results.title: Siddaramaiah informs cabinet colleagues of his decision to step down
results.description: According to CMO sources, the CM sought the Governor's appointment after the party high command apparently asked him to make way for a leadership change in the state.

results.title: How an Indian man earned ₹1,200 in 10 minutes in London before getting caught
results.description: A 25-year-old Indian man has revealed how he managed to earn 10 pounds in London in just 10 minutes
